title: Icon Items Mod
description: This mod adds icons and logos from various websites and projects in item form into the game.
body: # Icon Items This mod adds icons and logos from various websites and projects in item form into the game. ~~There's also some bribery item~~ ![forge support](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Erb3/Cactusfix/1.20.x/assets/forge_64h.png) These are all the icon items in a (messy) dropped form These are all items in a nice little grid # 🏳️‍🌈-Pridecraft- Have you ever thought that your game is too boring and straight? Well, that's no more! Get [Pridepack](https://pridecraft.gay/pridepack) *(or [it's variations](https://git.pridecraft.gay))* today!
